solutions.title: Solution (vovuh)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
{
val t
=
readLine
()!!.
toInt
()
repeat
(
t
)
{
val n
=
readLine
()!!.
toInt
()
val x
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
var
ans
=
false
for
(
i
in
1
until
n
)
{
if
((
x
[
i
]
-
x
[
i
-
1
])
%
2
==
0
)
{
ans
=
true
}
}
println
(
if
(
ans
)
"YES"
else
"NO"
)
}
}
